user.title: Tapo ONVIF Events
user.description: Connect to a Tapo camera's ONVIF PullPoint event stream. Use the camera's ONVIF/"Camera Account" credentials (set in the Tapo app), not your TP-Link cloud login.

data_description.username: The camera-account username you set in the Tapo app.
data_description.password: The camera-account password you set in the Tapo app.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host, ONVIF port (2020) and camera-account credentials.

data_description.flap_recovery: Enable only for a camera whose ONVIF connection repeatedly drops (endless 'Server disconnected' reconnects). Escalates the reconnect backoff, stops flooding the log, and marks the camera unavailable while the event feed is down instead of showing a false 'clear'. Leave OFF for healthy cameras.
